sections.title: Crypto & Finance
sections.description: Bitcoin, digital assets, blockchain, and fintech stories reshaping how money moves.

stories.title: Solana Foundation taps Mastercard, Western Union, Worldpay for institutional developer platform
stories.summary: The platform is a toolkit that lets enterprises create and scale financial applications on Solana without deep crypto infrastructure expertise.

stories.title: Mastercard, Western Union tap Solana Foundation’s new enterprise developer toolbox
stories.summary: The platform offers three API modules to help issue RWAs, support payments, and enable onchain swaps supported by 20 launch partners.

stories.title: Coinbase says the 'second wave' of institutional money for crypto is here and it is all about yield
stories.summary: Coinbase’s head of institutional, Brett Tejpaul, says institutional priorities in crypto are evolving, and investors are increasingly hunting for yield.

stories.title: Wall Street broker Bernstein calls bitcoin bottom, keeps $150,000 year-end target
stories.summary: The broker sees bitcoin rebounding from its recent lows, supported by ETF flows and expanding corporate treasury demand.

stories.title: Bittensor Leads AI Altcoin Surge as Short Squeeze, Conflicting Iran Talks Claims Fuel Volatility
stories.summary: AI altcoins notched double-digit gains amid conflict-related volatility, buoyed by last week's Nvidia GTC conference.

stories.title: ParaFi defies crypto market downturn with $125 million raise for new fund: Bloomberg
stories.summary: The firm now manages about $2 billion, having already raised an additional $325 million for existing crypto investment strategies since last year.

stories.title: New York Stock Exchange taps Securitize to build its tokenized stock platform
stories.summary: The move comes as the race to bring equities to always-on blockchain markets is heating up after Nasdaq obtained regulatory approval for its tokenization plan.

stories.title: Wall Street will eventually submit to the rules of DeFi
stories.summary: Wall Street won’t tame DeFi. Regulation creates compliant tiers atop permissionless liquidity, forcing TradFi to adopt DeFi’s superior speed and composability.

stories.summary: Despite its relative rarity, the event reflects normal network behavior, as nodes adopt the chain with the most cumulative proof of work.

stories.title: Morning Minute: Saylor Gains Access to Another $44B to Buy Bitcoin
stories.summary: Strategy just unveiled a $44 billion war chest to keep buying Bitcoin, while Congress is moving to ban sports bets on prediction markets.

stories.title: FSB flags dollar stablecoins as bigger risk for emerging markets in annual report
stories.summary: US dollar-denominated stablecoins may expose emerging economies to external macro shocks and financial stability risks, according to the Financial Stability board.

stories.summary: New partnership lets hedge funds and other large investors trade event contracts using crypto collateral held on BitGo’s platform.

stories.summary: BitGo's institutional clients will be able to access prediction markets via the custodian's platform and post cash or crypto as collateral.
